title: JEO - Original
description: JEO - Just enugh optimization, is a optimization modpack with different versions.
body:
> Thanks yaal' for 100 downloads <3 > This Modpack's best version is the 1.21 (it runs way better) ![Mini header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e268259133c73e2643b9fadf95f41c3b44b1e62f_0.webp)

JEO is a modpack that don't have anything expect mods from MODRINTH 1st page

We have mods just for performance not for anything else. Check out what we using:

Mods Our mods: |×| Mod | |--|--| | | ImmediatelyFast | | | Cloth Config API | | Sodium | | Reese's Sodium Options | | Dynamic FPS | | Fabric Language Kotlin | | Indium | | Sodium Extra | | Fabric API | | Lithium | | Mod Menu | | ModernFix
If I forgot about a mod or forgot to make a new version, tell me that here:[ Github ](https://github.com/BernieDevStudio/JEO-original/tree/main)
